scripts.k6: test -d test && cd test && k6 run test.js
scripts.k6:smoke: test -d test && cd test && k6 run smoke.js
scripts.k6:dev: test -d test && cd test && K6_RATE=20 K6_DURATION=30s K6_PRE_ALLOCATED_VUS=20 K6_MAX_VUS=50 K6_LIMIT=600 k6 run test.js
scripts.k6:docker:smoke: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 grafana/k6 run smoke.js
scripts.k6:docker:dev: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 -e K6_RATE=20 -e K6_DURATION=30s -e K6_PRE_ALLOCATED_VUS=20 -e K6_MAX_VUS=50 -e K6_LIMIT=600 grafana/k6 run test.js
scripts.k6:docker: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 grafana/k6 run test.js
